## Issue to Resolve

No spacing around colon in annotation
Spacing should not be allowed around the colon in annotation and annotation entries regardless of the annotation target

```
@file:JvmName("Foo") // allowed
@file :JvmName("Foo") // disallowed
@file: JvmName("Foo") // disallowed
@file : JvmName("Foo") // disallowed

@set:[Inject VisibleForTesting] // allowed
@set :[Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
@set: [Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
@set : [Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
```

```kotlin
if (node.isPartOf(ANNOTATION) || node.isPartOf(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)) {
    // TODO: https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues/2093 Enforce no spacing
    return
}
```

1. For annotations (like `@file:JvmName`), there should be NO space before or after the colon
2. For annotation entries (like `@set:[Inject VisibleForTesting]`), there should be NO space before or after the colon

Looking at the existing test at line 89-103, it shows valid cases with no spacing.

Now I need to modify the code to:
1. Remove the early return
2. Add checks for unexpected spacing before and after the colon when in annotations

content.text:
The fix has been successfully implemented. Let me provide a summary of the changes:

## Summary of Changes

### Problem
The `SpacingAroundColonRule` was not enforcing spacing rules for colons in annotations. The rule had a TODO comment indicating this needed to be fixed (issue #2093).

### Solution
Modified `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundColonRule.kt`:

1. **Changed lines 39-42**: Instead of just returning early when encountering a colon in annotations, the code now calls a new function `removeUnexpectedSpacingAround()` to validate and fix spacing issues.

2. **Added new function `removeUnexpectedSpacingAround()`** (lines 161-191): This function:
   - Checks for whitespace before and after the colon
   - Emits appropriate error messages based on the spacing found:
     - "Unexpected spacing around \":\"" - when there's spacing on both sides
     - "Unexpected spacing before \":\"" - when there's spacing only before the colon
     - "Unexpected spacing after \":\"" - when there's spacing only after the colon
   - Auto-corrects by removing the unnecessary whitespace nodes

### Fix Behavior
The rule now correctly handles all the cases from the issue:

| Code | Status | Action |
|------|--------|--------|
| `@file:JvmName("Foo")` | Allowed | No change |
| `@file :JvmName("Foo")` | Disallowed | Reports error & auto-corrects |
| `@file: JvmName("Foo")` | Disallowed | Reports error & auto-corrects |
| `@file : JvmName("Foo")` | Disallowed | Reports error & auto-corrects |
| `@set:[Inject VisibleForTesting]` | Allowed | No change |
| `@set :[Inject VisibleForTesting]` | Disallowed | Reports error & auto-corrects |
| `@set: [Inject VisibleForTesting]` | Disallowed | Reports error & auto-corrects |
| `@set : [Inject VisibleForTesting]` | Disallowed | Reports error & auto-corrects |

All existing tests continue to pass, confirming the fix doesn't break any existing functionality.
